root_text.an3.146:1.1: “Tīhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an3.146:1.3: Akusalena kāyakammena, akusalena vacīkammena, akusalena manokammena—
root_text.an3.146:1.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhi dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an3.146:2.1: Tīhi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge.
root_text.an3.146:2.3: Kusalena kāyakammena, kusalena vacīkammena, kusalena manokammena—
root_text.an3.146:2.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, tīhi dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge”ti.

translation_text.an3.146:1.1: “Someone with three qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an3.146:1.3: Unskillful deeds by way of body, speech, and mind.
translation_text.an3.146:1.4: Someone with these three qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an3.146:2.1: Someone with three qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.
translation_text.an3.146:2.3: Skillful deeds by way of body, speech, and mind.
translation_text.an3.146:2.4: Someone with these three qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.”
